meaning: n.小屋,鸡(兔)笼,拘留所,<俗>监狱vt.关进(鸡舍等),拘禁
examples: Lionel built a coop so that they could raise chickens and have a supply of fresh eggs.
I don't own shares in The Coop.
Let us stop a few minutes at that pigeon coop down there.
In April, as part of Austin's first Funky Chicken Coop Tour, she hosted 637 visitors.
They found a small muddied heap near Lillian's house, by the steps of the chicken coop.
